# Sample App

A small demo app used to test ArchLens DocsGap.

## Setup

Run `npm install` then `npm run dev` to start the dev server.

See `src/app.ts` for the entry point.

Build with `npm run build`.

## Legacy notes

Also check `src/old/legacy.ts` for legacy code.

To run unit tests use `npm run test:unit`.

For utilities see `helper.ts`.

Bootstrap script: `python3 scripts/missing.py`.

See the [configuration guide](docs/config.md) for environment variables.
